data.title: Fidelity Highlights Bitcoin Lightning Network's Efficiency
data.description: According to Odaily, a recent report by Fidelity emphasizes that the Bitcoin Lightning Network is fulfilling its promise as the most efficient transaction method within the digital asset ecosystem.

data.title: Musk: Grok 3 will be free and open to everyone in the short term
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News xAI announced that Grok 3 is now available for free (until our servers crash). X Premium+ and SuperGrok users will have more access to Grok 3, in addition to early access to advanced features such as voice mode. Musk said that in a short period of time, Grok 3 will be free for everyone.

data.title: Gate.io launches PI contract trading event, offering 20,000 USDT prize pool
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch PI perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) at 16:00 (UTC+8) on February 20, 2025, supporting 1-50 times leverage, and simultaneously opening PI contract trading activities. Users only need to participate in the transaction to share the 20,000 USDT prize pool. New users can enjoy "exclusive airdrops, full-member ranking competitions" and other activities, and a single person can get up to 2,000 USDT rewards.
CoinGecko data shows that Gate.io has cumulatively supported more than 600 perpetual contract currencies and has more than 21 million users worldwide.

data.title: Analysis: The community/partners have not yet transferred or sold a total of 15% of PAIN allocations, and a total of $11.37 million worth of liquidity has been injected
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, in addition to the 50% PAIN held by Harold himself, which has been locked, a total of 15% of the tokens of the community/partners have not been transferred or sold yet.
The distribution of PAIN's main liquidity pool is: a total of 11.37 million US dollars worth of liquidity has been injected (accounting for 82% of the main liquidity pool under 1% handling fee), including 129,000 PAIN and 52,490 SOL, and the unclaimed handling fee income is as high as 344,000 US dollars. Currently, only the [0.104251 - 0.205086] price range is still in effect, which is converted to US dollars as [17.88 US dollars - 35.2 US dollars], and the rest of the positions have been temporarily invalidated.

data.title: Fidelity: Bitcoin Lightning Network is becoming the most efficient transaction method in the digital asset ecosystem
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fidelity pointed out in a recent report that the Bitcoin Lightning Network is fulfilling its promise to become the most efficient transaction method in the digital asset ecosystem. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Metaplanet’s current BTC holdings account for 0.01% of the total supply
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Japanese listed company Metaplanet stated that its current BTC holdings account for 0.01% of the total supply.

data.title: Crypto market sectors generally rose, with PayFi leading the way with a 5.21% gain, and AI Agents falling back for two consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On February 20, according to SoSoValue data, the crypto market sectors generally rose, with the PayFi sector leading the rise by 5.21%. Within the sector, XRP was affected by factors such as Trump sharing related articles on Truth Social, and the 24-hour increase was 5.78%, and Stellar (XLM) rose by 3.90%. The AI ​​sector rebounded, rising 3.52% in 24 hours. Within the sector, Bittensor (TAO) rose 15.61%, and Golem (GLM) rose 16.16%. However, AI Agents, the AI ​​sub-sector, fell 2.68%, Virtuals Protocol (VIRTUAL) fell 3.21%, and Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) fell 8.72%.
In terms of other sectors, the Layer1 sector rose by 1.68% in 24 hours. Within the sector, Cardano (ADA) rose by 4.09%, Sui (SUI) rose by 4.65%, and Aptos (APT) rose by 14.21%; the DeFi sector rose by 1.22%, the Layer2 sector rose by 1.20%, the Meme sector rose by 1.15%, and the CeFi sector rose by 0.85%.

data.title: Nexus Faces Challenges Amid Increased Requests And DoS Attacks
data.description: According to Odaily, Nexus has announced on X that its Nexus Orchestrator is currently dealing with a surge in requests and denial-of-service (DoS) attacks. The team is actively working to maintain network stability and has urged users to stay updated on further developments.

data.title: Walrus will launch the mainnet in March and launch WAL tokens: a total of 5 billion, 10% for Walrus User Drop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Decentralized storage and data availability protocol Walrus announced on X that the mainnet will be launched in March and the native token WAL will be launched. The total supply is 5 billion, 10% of which will be allocated to Walrus User Drop, of which 4% will be used for initial airdrops and 6% for future distributions.

data.title: Kaito Futures Trade At $1.3693 On Aevo With Significant Volume
data.description: According to BlockBeats, as of February 20, Kaito futures on the Aevo platform are currently priced at $1.3693. The 24-hour trading volume for these futures has reached $271,300.
